exploration_notes: The bug fix is concentrated in a single file: `src/components/views/right_panel/RoomHeaderButtons.tsx`. The patch makes 7 changes: (1) removes `useSettingValue` import, (2) changes `PinnedMessagesHeaderButton` to call `usePinnedEvents(room)` and `useReadPinnedEvents(room)` directly without `feature_pinning` gating, (3) types `threadNotificationState` as `ThreadsRoomNotificationState | null`, (4) guards constructor assignment with `this.props.room` check and falls back to `null`, (5) uses optiona
